  <entry>
    <id>tag:status.claude.com,2005:Incident/30810121</id>
    <published>2026-07-07T01:07:51Z</published>
    <updated>2026-07-07T01:07:51Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://status.claude.com/incidents/d23j8s7t8rx2"/>
    <title>Claude Tag seeing elevated GitHub operation failures</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 6</var>, <var data-var='time'>21:49</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Investigating</strong> - We are currently investigating elevated error rates on calls made Claude Tag. Our team is actively working to identify the root cause. You may experience errors such as GitHub operations denied. </p></content>
  </entry>
  <entry>
    <id>tag:status.claude.com,2005:Incident/30809043</id>
    <published>2026-07-06T20:05:43Z</published>
    <updated>2026-07-06T20:05:43Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://status.claude.com/incidents/k5yvlfppnp4f"/>
    <title>Elevated errors on Claude.ai</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 6</var>, <var data-var='time'>20:05</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Resolved</strong> - This issue has been resolved. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 6</var>, <var data-var='time'>19:46</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Monitoring</strong> - We have applied a fix, and at this time are seeing recovery of Claude.ai and related services such as OAuth log-in for Claude Code. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 6</var>, <var data-var='time'>19:28</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Update</strong> - We have identified and are working to resolve an issue impacting Claude.ai. An additional impact of the ongoing issue is the inability to log-in via Claude.ai OAuth for Claude Code. We will provide an additional update as soon as possible. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 6</var>, <var data-var='time'>19:18</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Investigating</strong> - We are investigating elevated errors on Claude.ai, and will provide an update as soon as possible. </p></content>
  </entry>
  <entry>

    <title>Elevated errors on several models</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 6</var>, <var data-var='time'>09:13</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Resolved</strong> - This incident has been resolved. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 6</var>, <var data-var='time'>08:45</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Identified</strong> - Fable 5 has now also started returning errors. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 6</var>, <var data-var='time'>07:36</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Investigating</strong> - We are currently investigating this issue. </p></content>
  </entry>
